TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sakuhan, title = Sakuhan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sakuhan} }

S.FORM: alang Sakuhan ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 368 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 266 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 102 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan68%, Amis1%, Bunun2%, Truku1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sakuhan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sakuhan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sakuhan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sakuhan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sakuhan hya' ga Maibagah. tay mkyahu' na Sakuhan hya' ga Suru. rekisi tayal na alang Sakuhan ga kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sakuhan ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 368 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 72% kyan ku 266 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 28% kyan ku 102 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan68%, Amis1%, Bunun2%, Truku1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sakuhan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sakuhan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sakuhan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sakuhan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sakuhan hya' ga Maibagah. tay mkyahu' na Sakuhan hya' ga Suru. rekisi tayal na alang Sakuhan ga kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕakuħan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan**%, amis~ɕ*%, βunun*%, truku*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕakuħan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕakuħan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕakuħan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕakuħan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕakuħan ħjaʔ ɣa maiβaɣaħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕakuħan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕuru. rekis~ɕi tajal na alaŋ s~ɕakuħan ɣa kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
